content.text:
Based on the visualization of the molecule, I can clearly identify the neighbor atoms of atom index 5 (C:5). Looking at the structure:

Atom C:5 is connected to:
- C:4 (carbon atom with index 4)
- C:6 (carbon atom with index 6)
- S:19 (sulfur atom with index 19)

These three atoms are directly bonded to C:5 via covalent bonds.

Regarding the geomconf_index, from the file name "geomconf_4188.xyz" in the working directory, I can determine that the geomconf_index for this molecule is 4188.

So the neighbor atoms of atom index 5 (C) are:
- Atom index 4 (C)
- Atom index 6 (C)
- Atom index 19 (S)

Geomconf_index: 4188

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 5, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
